## Checklist

- [ ] `python scripts/validate.py` passes locally (YAML, JSON, Markdown links, secret scan)
- [ ] `kyverno test examples/policy-as-code/tests` passes (if policies changed)
- [ ] No employer-private detail (names, hostnames, IPs, account IDs, credentials, state)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or structure changed
